title: SEX OFFENDER REGISTRATION UNIT - 211info
text: OREGON STATE POLICE HEADQUARTERS SEX OFFENDER REGISTRATION UNIT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Tracks people convicted of sex crimes who reside, work, or attend school in the state of Oregon. This list and the sex offender website include only those sex offenders designated under state law as predatory who have also been determined to present the highest risk of re-offending and to require the widest range of notification or found to be a sexually violent dangerous offender under state law. 3565 Trelstad Avenue SE Salem, OR 97317 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 934-1258 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Sex Offender Questions (503) 934-1258 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Offender Registries/Community Notification Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD CHECKS LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - OREGON STATE POLICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE POLICE HEADQUARTERS
